productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Blue-White Stripes Shirts
description: Composition White shirt with navy blue vertical stripes made of 100% cotton, with full hand sleeves, front buttoned placket, tipped collar with tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, branding embroidered on left chest and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron White and navy blue is a classic combination that adds immense style to your casual look. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish spykar shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and black footwear to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
